DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MMJ CORPORATION ADBA CUSTOM ADAPTIVE VANS FULLER, MARSHALL W FULLER, GAIL POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE ROMAC #RFS2414RF REVERSE FLOW SPRAY BOOTH,CUSTOM SIZES:26'LONGX14'WIDEX11'6"HIGH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $6,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $13,228.04 DAMAGES, $1,650.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $208.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,086.04, INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $228.06 FOR TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $15315.10. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
